Traffic Light Controller
  • top
  • top — Entity
  • View page source

top — Entity

Source file: src/top.vhd.

ENTITY top IS
Generics

Generic

Type

Default

Description
Ports

Port

Type

Mode

Description

clk

std_logic

in

System clock 50 MHz.

rst

std_logic

in

Synchronous active-high reset (sys_clk domain).

cfg_clk

std_logic

in

Config bus clock (slow, e.g. 10 MHz from external MCU).

cfg_rst

std_logic

in

Synchronous active-high reset (cfg_clk domain).

mode_sel

std_logic

in

Config inputs (cfg_clk domain).

duty_cycle

std_logic_vector(7 downto 0)

in

red_out

std_logic

out

Traffic light outputs.

amber_out

std_logic

out

green_out

std_logic

out

led_on

std_logic

out

Blinky LED outputs.

led_fade

std_logic

out

led_off

std_logic

out

pwm_out

std_logic

out

PWM output for LED fading (shared).

Annotated Source

src/top.vhd
 1-- Top-level integration module.
 2--
 3-- Instantiates the traffic_light controller, blinky LED module, PWM
 4-- controller, and cfg_sync. Runtime configuration (blinky enable and PWM
 5-- duty cycle) arrives on a slow config bus clock and is synchronised into
 6-- the main 50 MHz domain by cfg_sync.
 7library ieee;
 8use ieee.std_logic_1164.all;
 9
10entity top is
11    port (
12        -- System clock 50 MHz.
13        clk          : in  std_logic;
14        -- Synchronous active-high reset (sys_clk domain).
15        rst          : in  std_logic;
16        -- Config bus clock (slow, e.g. 10 MHz from external MCU).
17        cfg_clk      : in  std_logic;
18        -- Synchronous active-high reset (cfg_clk domain).
19        cfg_rst      : in  std_logic;
20        -- Config inputs (cfg_clk domain).
21        mode_sel     : in  std_logic;
22        duty_cycle   : in  std_logic_vector(7 downto 0);
23        -- Traffic light outputs.
24        red_out      : out std_logic;
25        amber_out    : out std_logic;
26        green_out    : out std_logic;
27        -- Blinky LED outputs.
28        led_on       : out std_logic;
29        led_fade     : out std_logic;
30        led_off      : out std_logic;
31        -- PWM output for LED fading (shared).
32        pwm_out      : out std_logic
33    );
34end entity top;
35
36architecture rtl of top is
37
38    signal timer_exp   : std_logic;
39    signal blinky_en   : std_logic;
40    signal pwm_duty    : std_logic_vector(7 downto 0);
41    signal period_done : std_logic;
42
43begin
44
45    -- u_cfg_sync: Synchronise config bus inputs into the system clock domain.
46    u_cfg_sync : entity work.cfg_sync
47        port map (
48            sys_clk    => clk,
49            sys_rst    => rst,
50            cfg_clk    => cfg_clk,
51            cfg_rst    => cfg_rst,
52            mode_sel   => mode_sel,
53            duty_cycle => duty_cycle,
54            blinky_en  => blinky_en,
55            pwm_duty   => pwm_duty
56        );
57
58    -- u_traffic_light: Traffic light FSM instance.
59    u_traffic_light : entity work.traffic_light
60        port map (
61            clk       => clk,
62            rst       => rst,
63            timer_exp => timer_exp,
64            red_out   => red_out,
65            amber_out => amber_out,
66            green_out => green_out
67        );
68
69    -- u_blinky: Blinky LED FSM instance.
70    u_blinky : entity work.blinky
71        port map (
72            clk       => clk,
73            rst       => rst,
74            en        => blinky_en,
75            timer_exp => timer_exp,
76            led_on    => led_on,
77            led_fade  => led_fade,
78            led_off   => led_off
79        );
80
81    -- u_pwm: PWM controller shared between traffic light and blinky fade.
82    u_pwm : entity work.pwm_controller
83        port map (
84            clk         => clk,
85            rst         => rst,
86            en          => blinky_en,
87            duty_i      => pwm_duty,
88            pwm_o       => pwm_out,
89            period_done => period_done
90        );
91
92end architecture rtl;
